rule: General/non-distress text is mapped to Low stress.
Frustration shows pressure/irritation but not necessarily severe distress, so it is mapped to Medium stress.
Anxiety is treated as strong stress expression for the first three-class version.
Excluded from first version to avoid mixing depression with stress labels. May be reviewed later.
Excluded from first version because it is high-risk mental health content and not simply stress.
Binary non-stress text can support Low class if needed.
Binary stress text can support High class if needed. No Medium class available.
